creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
on 16/06/2010 12:27 Dima Panov said the following:
> 
> Some errors in port, regarding to docs and build process
> By kde conventions, docs should be installed under 
> share/doc/HTML/${LANG}/${PORTNAME} instead of 
> share/doc/HTML/${LANG}
> 
> Also, don't try to remove common dirs via @dirrm, use @dirrmtry
> 
> Diff for your port attached, please review

Dima,

thanks a lot!
Looks very good.

-- 
Andriy Gapon
